case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. JOSE MANUEL PACHECO DOMINGUEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-23-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-23-2023 BY JUDGE MURLENE J. RANDLE. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES (ASSISANT MANAGER). DEFENDANT JOSE MANUEL PACHECO DOMINGUEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-20-2022 - CONTINUED FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER TO JAN-23-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) VERONIVCA ROSALES, ASSISTANT MANAGER. FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.
